name: AUBURN NATIONAL BANCORPORATION, INC
summary: Auburn National Bancorporation, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated bank holding company controlling AuburnBank, an Alabama state member bank founded in 1907. The Bank operates in East Alabama, primarily Lee County, offering checking, savings, certificates of deposit, residential mortgage lending, commercial and consumer loans, ATM services, Visa Checkcards, online banking, bill payment, and electronic banking services through 7 branches and a main office in Auburn, Opelika, Notasulga, and Valley, Alabama.

products.name: Checking and Savings Accounts
products.description: Transaction deposit accounts and certificates of deposit offered to retail and commercial customers.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Lending
products.description: Active residential mortgage origination in the Bank's primary service area in East Alabama.

products.name: Commercial and Consumer Loans
products.description: Commercial, financial, agricultural, real estate construction, and consumer loan products.

products.name: Visa Checkcards
products.description: Debit cards with Visa logo usable domestically and internationally through the Plus network.

products.name: Online Banking and Bill Payment
products.description: Internet-based banking, bill payment, online consumer account opening, and electronic banking services.

products.name: ATM Services
products.description: ATM machines operated at 8 locations in the primary service area.

partnerships.partner_name: Federal Home Loan Bank of Atlanta
partnerships.description: Member since 1991, providing access to funding and liquidity resources.
Member since April 1995; Federal Reserve serves as a primary regulator.
